channel.title: Industry Deep Dives on Multi-Agent Future
channel.description: Recent content in Industry Deep Dives on Multi-Agent Future

item.title: How Multi-Agent AI Is Replacing $200/Hour Legal Associates in Document Review
item.description: Law firms spend 60-80% of litigation budgets on document review. Multi-agent AI systems are cutting that by 90% while improving accuracy. Here's exactly how it works, with implementation prompts.

item.title: AI Agents in Clinical Trials: From White Space to Warp Speed
item.description: How agentic AI is cutting clinical trial timelines, automating CRA workflows, and reshaping drug development from recruitment to database lock.
